Step: Tap the "FM" source button on the Audio screen
Expected Result: FM Radio source is selected and the FM tuner interface is displayed

Step: Verify the current FM frequency is displayed on screen
Expected Result: An FM frequency value (e.g. 87.5 - 108.0 MHz) is shown

Step: Tap the "Seek Up" (>>) button to scan to the next station
Expected Result: The frequency changes and a new station is tuned; the frequency display updates

Step: Verify the new frequency is displayed and is different from the starting frequency
Expected Result: A new FM frequency is shown on screen

Step: Tap the "Seek Down" (<<) button to scan to the previous station
Expected Result: The frequency changes and a station is tuned; the frequency display updates

Step: Verify the frequency has changed again
Expected Result: The FM frequency display shows an updated value

Step: Tap the first preset button (Preset 1) to store the current station
Expected Result: The current station is saved to Preset 1 (button may highlight or show confirmation)

Step: Tap "Seek Up" (>>) to tune to a different station
Expected Result: A different station frequency is displayed

Step: Tap Preset 1 button to recall the saved station
Expected Result: The FM tuner returns to the frequency that was saved in Preset 1

Step: Verify the displayed frequency matches the originally saved Preset 1 frequency
Expected Result: The frequency matches the station stored in step 7
